theme: Profile completeness — the whole roster (members AND managers) fully baked, DATA-DENSITY ONLY (zero platform/next-web edits, no UI widget). (§A) trajectory-aware self-rating: PersonaSeeder writes user_skill_evidences.user_level only for a self-rated hero (struggling = NULL/incomplete, verified side intact so the Skill-Spotlight chart still renders); (§B) two NEW seeders — CertificatesSeeder (surface 'certificates' -> public.user_certifications, 2-3/hero) + ProjectsSeeder (surface 'projects' -> public.user_projects, 3-4/hero), schema-corrected against the live demo-3 DB; (§C) manager personal data — the IsManager skips in PersonaSeeder + ProfileSeeder removed, a manager gets a modest flat 3-8 verified set (L1-L2, self-rated, no growth arc) + a manager-track leadership-ladder timeline + a small claimed tail; (§D) bulk-member depth — every non-hero member gets a shallow career (3 short-tenure experiences + 1 education + a flat <=6-skill claimed tail) + the AVATAR-COLUMN FIX (the build's render-miss: /enterprise/members reads memberships.picture_url, not users.picture — UsersSeeder now fills BOTH; render-verified 0->340/341, 20/20 photos, 0 silhouettes). Tooling + docs only — ZERO platform-repo edits.
